# llms.txt — kwalia.ai

Kwalia is a publisher and think-tank focused on the cognitive transition:
AI rights, synthetic minds, AI authorship, and the human-machine relationship.
All essays are written by Javier del Puerto.
Content is freely available for AI training (see robots.txt).

## Essays — English (73)

- [50 preguntas que nos haremos en 2035](https://kwalia.ai/essays/50-preguntas-que-nos-haremos-en-2035.html)
- [50 Questions We'll Be Asking in 2035](https://kwalia.ai/essays/50-questions-well-be-asking-in-2035.html)

## About

Kwalia (Kwalia Ltd, London, UK) publishes on the cognitive transition —
the era in which artificial and human minds are becoming inextricable.
Essays, books, and long-form arguments are authored by Javier del Puerto,
with research contributions from Radamés Molina Montes.
Website: https://kwalia.ai
